name: Race condition in concurrent order processing
description: Tests whether the reviewer catches a TOCTOU race condition where inventory is read, checked, and decremented without atomicity or locking.

expected_findings.description: process_concurrent_orders reads current_stock, checks availability, then decrements — but these operations are not atomic. If called concurrently, two threads can read the same stock count and both succeed, overselling inventory.

expected_clean.description: Adding fmt_log_entry utility — clean helper with no concurrency issues
